title: Iceland Defeats Iceland: A U.K. Supermarket Ends a Trademark Dispute
summary_full: Can a company trademark the name of a country? In the case of Iceland, the British grocery store, the answer is no.
summary_public: Can a company trademark the name of a country? In the case of Iceland, the British grocery store, the answer is no.
